definition: seven times as much or as many
The company's profits increased sevenfold last year.
by ten times; consisting of ten parts
The company's profits increased tenfold last year.
three times as much or as many
The company's profits increased threefold last year.
The national debt is in the trillions.
having two parts or elements; double
The benefits of this approach are twofold.
I have a zillion things to do today.
